stemHtml: When the aircraft is well above the approach slope, the pilot will see the following PAPI lights…

options.a: The unit nearest to and the unit farthest from the runway are white, the two others are red.
options.b: The unit nearest to and the unit farthest from the runway are steady white, the two in the centre are flashing white.
options.c: All four units are steady white.
options.d: All four units are steady red.
